chapters.subtitle: The prologue to everything.
chapters.description: Some moments are quiet, unassuming. But they shift the trajectory of your entire life.

chapters.title: Chapter 2: Memories
chapters.subtitle: A chronicle of our time.
chapters.description: An editorial chronology of the days we laughed, cried, and grew together.

chapters.title: Chapter 3: Things I Love About You
chapters.subtitle: A curated collection.
chapters.description: An interactive gallery of the countless little reasons why you are extraordinary.

chapters.title: Chapter 4: Little Surprises
chapters.subtitle: Words for when you need them.
chapters.description: A collection of sealed letters, waiting to be opened precisely when the moment calls for them.

chapters.title: Chapter 5: Happy Birthday
chapters.subtitle: The July Issue Finale.
chapters.description: Today is your day. The grand finale of this digital magazine.

openWhenLetters.title: Open when you are sad
openWhenLetters.description: When the skies are grey and you need a little sunshine.
openWhenLetters.content:
Hey beautiful,

If you're reading this, it means today is a bit heavy, and I hate that I'm not right there to hug the sadness out of you. I want you to close your eyes, take a deep breath, and remember how loved you are. You are the strongest, most resilient person I know, but it is okay to not be okay right now. Let the tears fall if they need to. Just remember that this storm is temporary, and I will always be here to hold your hand through it. You make my world infinitely brighter, and I'll do whatever it takes to bring that beautiful smile back to your face. I love you, always.

openWhenLetters.title: Open when you are angry at me
openWhenLetters.description: When I've said or done something silly and you need space.
openWhenLetters.content:
My love,

First, I want to say: I am so sorry. Whatever I did or said to hurt or annoy you, please know it was never, ever my intention. I love you more than words can express, and the last thing I ever want to do is cause you pain or frustration. I might be stubborn, silly, or just plain thick-headed sometimes, but my heart is always yours. Take all the time and space you need to cool down. When you're ready, I'm here to listen, to apologize properly, and to make it right. Thank you for loving me despite my flaws. I'm waiting with open arms.

openWhenLetters.title: Open when you can't sleep
openWhenLetters.description: When the night is long and your mind won't rest.
openWhenLetters.content:
Hey sleepyhead (or not-so-sleepyhead),

It's late, the world is quiet, and your mind is running. I wish I was lying right next to you, letting you rest your head on my chest while I stroke your hair until you drift off. Since I can't be there in person, let this letter be a warm blanket. Inhale... exhale. Think about our happiest days: walking together, laughing at stupid jokes, or just holding hands. You are safe, you are loved, and tomorrow is a brand new day. Let go of whatever is keeping you awake. I'll be dreaming of you, and I hope to meet you in yours. Sweet dreams, my angel.

openWhenLetters.title: Open when you miss me
openWhenLetters.description: When the distance feels too long and you need a hug.
openWhenLetters.content:
My dearest,

I miss you too. I miss you every single second we are apart. Distance is hard, but it only proves how strong our bond is. Every mile between us is just a reminder of how much I want to be near you. Close your eyes, wrap your arms around yourself, and squeeze. That's a hug from me, sent across the distance. We will be back together soon, laughing and creating more memories. Until then, hold onto this: you are in my every thought, my every prayer, and my entire heart. We've got this. I love you to the moon and back.

memories.title: Our First Conversation
memories.description: A simple text message that sparked a beautiful fire.
memories.caption: The moment the stars aligned. Who knew a single 'hello' would lead to a lifetime of love?

memories.title: Our First Date
memories.description: We met under the autumn trees and talked for hours.
memories.caption: My heart was beating so fast. Seeing you in person for the first time felt like a dream come true.

memories.title: Winter Walk & Hot Cocoa
memories.description: Huddled together in the cold, sharing a warm drink.
memories.caption: Cold hands, but the warmest hearts. Sharing hot chocolate with you is my favorite winter memory.

memories.title: Valentine's Surprise
memories.description: A handwritten letter and a box of chocolates.
memories.caption: You whispered 'I love you' and my heart melted. Press play to hear an ambient romantic tone.

memories.title: Watching the Sunset
memories.description: Sitting silently on the hilltop, watching the sky turn pink and orange.
memories.caption: The sky was beautiful, but I couldn't keep my eyes off you.

dailyQuotes: You are my sun, my moon, and all my stars.
In all the world, there is no heart for me like yours.
I love you not only for what you are, but for what I am when I am with you.
If I know what love is, it is because of you.
You make me want to be a better man.
My heart is and always will be yours.
Every love story is beautiful, but ours is my favorite.
I swear I couldn't love you more than I do right now, and yet I know I will tomorrow.
You are the finest, loveliest, tenderest, and most beautiful person I have ever known.
Whatever our souls are made of, his and mine are the same.
Grow old along with me! The best is yet to be.
I want all of you, forever, you and me, every day.
You are my today and all of my tomorrows.

coupons.title: Cozy Movie Night
coupons.description: Good for one movie night. You pick the movie, I bring the popcorn and cuddles.

coupons.title: Endless Warm Hugs
coupons.description: Redeemable anytime for a 3-minute warm embrace.

coupons.title: Ice Cream Date
coupons.description: Double scoop of your favorite flavor, on me, anytime you want.

coupons.title: Late-Night Scenic Drive
coupons.description: Good for a midnight cruise with your favorite playlist.

coupons.title: Infinite Sweet Kisses
coupons.description: Redeemable for a forehead, cheek, or lip kiss whenever you need one.
